title: It Could Happen Here Weekly 238
description:
All of this week's episodes of It Could Happen Here put together in one large file. 

  • The Truth Behind the Alleged Terror Plot at the White House UFC Fight
  • An Update from Belfast
  • The Condition of the Trans Working Class in America
  • Executive Disorder: Prairieland Sentencing, DOGE Deaths, DSA Sweep in New York
  • How Graham Platner Won the Democratic Primary

You can now listen to all Cool Zone Media shows, 100% ad-free through the Cooler Zone Media subscription, available exclusively on Apple Podcasts. So, open your Apple Podcasts app, search for “Cooler Zone Media” and subscribe today!

http://apple.co/coolerzone
